ddls:
CREATE TABLE "graduate_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of enrollment (e.g., Degree-seeking, All other graduates) */,
  "programs" TEXT /* Specific program(s) associated with the enrollment record */,
  "full_time_men" INTEGER /* Number of full-time male graduate students */,
  "full_time_women" INTEGER /* Number of full-time female graduate students */,
  "part_time_men" INTEGER /* Number of part-time male graduate students */,
  "part_time_women" INTEGER /* Number of part-time female graduate students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_graduate_enrollment" (
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the total enrollment record */,
  "total_graduate" INTEGER /* Total number of graduate students */,
  "total_all_students" INTEGER /* Total number of all students enrolled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* The academic year for which statistics are provided */,
  "full_time_men" INTEGER /* Total full-time male students enrolled */,
  "full_time_women" INTEGER /* Total full-time female students enrolled */,
  "part_time_men" INTEGER /* Total part-time male students enrolled */,
  "part_time_women" INTEGER /* Total part-time female students enrolled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_statistics_academic_year FOREIGN KEY ("academic_year") REFERENCES graduate_enrollment ("category")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program's gender distribution record */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "men_enrolled" INTEGER /* Number of men enrolled in the program */,
  "women_enrolled" INTEGER /* Number of women enrolled in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gender_distribution_program_name FOREIGN KEY ("program_name") REFERENCES degree_programs ("program_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "degree_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree program */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* Level of degree (e.g., Masters, PhD) */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., online, on-campus, hybrid) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the program */,
  "total_enrolled" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the student (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the student */,
  "campus" TEXT /* Campus location of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment history record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enrollment record that is updated */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Student ID associated with the enrollment change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the enrollment change occurred */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the enrollment change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_history_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES student_demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_history_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES graduate_enrollment ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, registrar, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID associated with the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, page view, data modification) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
